title: Your Side Hustle Has a Hidden 15% Tax Nobody Warns You
hook: You started a side hustle to get ahead — but the IRS has a secret tax most freelancers never see coming until the bill arrives.
angle: Self-employment tax (15.3%) is on top of income tax — most side hustlers only think about income tax and get ambushed with a $1,224+ unexpected IRS bill
audience: Anyone with freelance, gig, or side hustle income who files as self-employed
key_numbers: 37% effective tax rate for many freelancers
45% of gig workers underpay quarterly taxes
